<function=python>
<parameter=code>

seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Identify all small objects (colors, slots)
print("Objects by position:")
for node in nodes:
    if node['pixels'] < 100:
        rows = [p[0] for p in node['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in node['boundary']]
        center_r = sum(rows) // len(rows)
        center_c = sum(cols) // len(cols)
        print(f"  color={node['color']}, px={node['pixels']}, center=({center_r},{center_c}), rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
